title: Kichler Lighting
description: [AI generated] Kichler Lighting is an American company headquartered in Garland, Texas, specializing in the design and distribution of decorative lighting fixtures, ceiling fans, and landscape lighting products. Founded in 1938, it operates within the residential and commercial lighting industry, offering a wide range of indoor and outdoor lighting solutions. Kichler sells its products through wholesale distributors and retail partners across the United States and internationally.
